idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 1; Esri ArcCatalog 9.1.0.706

descript.abstract: United States State Plane Zones (NAD 1927) is a polygon theme representing the State Plane Coordinate System (SPCS) Zones for the 1927 North American Datum within United States. Several State Plane Coordinate System zones are not shown in this dataset, including Puerto Rico, the U.S. Virgin Islands, American Samoa, Guam, and Louisiana's offshore zone.
descript.purpose: United States State Plane Zones (NAD 1927) is generalized and an approximation of the actual State Plane Coordinate System zone boundaries for the 1927 North American Datum. It is intended for visual reference at small and medium map scales. Please check with state authorities if you have a question about a zone boundary.
descript.supplinf: Largest scale when displaying the data: 1:5,000,000.

cntinfo.cntinst:
In the United States- Please direct all inquiries regarding software/data pricing and consulting services to your local Esri Regional Office. For support, you may contact Esri Support Center by telephone (voice) between 5:00 a.m. and 5:00 p.m. Pacific time, Monday through Friday, by dialing 888-377-4575; facsimile (fax) available at 909-792-0960; electronic mail (e-mail) support@esri.com; or visit http://support.esri.com/; Esri holidays excluded.
Outside the United States- Please direct all inquiries regarding software/data pricing, sales, support, and consulting services to your local Esri Office. This information can be found at http://www.esri.com/about-esri/locations.html.
For other questions or comments, you may contact Esri headquarters by e-mail, telephone, or fax or write to us.

citeinfo.title: ArcData Online GIS Data on the web -U.S. State Plane Zones Data Set

procstep.procdesc: This data set was created from several sources: Extracted state boundaries from ArcUSA™ 1:25M. Created state plane boundaries based on a graphic in the article, "A National Reference System and its Relationship to Mapping" by Alden P. Colvocoresses at the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS), and John P. Snyder's "An Album of Map Projections: A Working Manual" (1987: USGS Professional Paper 1395. U.S. Government Printing Office: Washington, D.C.).

The following steps were performed by Esri for Data & Maps 2002: Removed independent city void areas in Virginia.
The following steps were performed by Esri: Downloaded the ArcView GIS Shapefile, spcs_zone.zip, from http://www.esri.com/data/online/esri/datapacks/stateplane.html and extracted it. Removed unneeded attributes. Created ArcGIS layer file (.lyr). Created projection file (.prj). Ran ArcView GIS Avenue™ request ExportClean, and created spatial indices. Converted the data set to SDC.
The following steps were performed by Esri: Added SQMI attribute and calculated its values.

The following steps were performed by Esri: Renamed attribute ZONENAME27 to ZONE. Renamed FIPSZONE27 to FIPSZONE. Added attribute ZONENAME and calculated its values with the descriptions of attribute ZONE. Added attribute COLORMAP and calculated its values from 1 to 5.

horizpa.horizpar: The horizontal positional accuracy is unknown.

dataqual.logic: The shapefile is converted to SDC (Smart Data Compression) format using tools in ArcGIS. The SDC data set is then imported into a file geodatabase to verify, validate, and if needed repair the geometry. The data set boundaries are approximations of the actual State Plane Coordinate System zone boundaries.
dataqual.complete: After processing, the data set is checked for drawing display and number of records and file sizes compared with source materials.

enttyp.enttypd: The polygons represent areas for the State Plane Coordinate System zones for the 1927 North American Datum within United States.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdefs: National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (U.S. Coast and Geodetic Survey)

codesetd.codesets: National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (U.S. Coast and Geodetic Survey)

attr.attrdef: The FIPS code for the zone.
attr.attrdefs: Department of Commerce, National Institute of Standards and Technology

codesetd.codesets: National Institute of Standards and Technology

attr.attrdef: The measure of area in square miles.
The number allows the zone to be colored so zones of the same color don't touch.

stdorder.ordering: Data & Maps is available only as part of Esri software.

cntinfo.cntinst:
In the United States, contact the Esri Telebusiness staff at 800-447-9778 for more information about our software and data.
Outside the United States, please direct all inquiries to your local Esri Office. This information can be found at http://www.esri.com/about-esri/locations.html.

distinfo.techpreq: To use this data requires software that supports SDC files.

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

cntorgp.cntorg: Research Data Services (RDS), Columbia University Libraries
